subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-09-18
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that He has given you a prosperous country. Towns are flourishing, commerce is progressing and the outward evidences of prosperity are displayed with utmost beauty and perfection.
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله خداوند مملکتی آباد بشما داده شهرها معمور است تجارتها در ترقی و آثار عمران در نهایت جمال و کمال
subcodes.subjects: @Satan; the Evil One, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
